features: REUSABLE & HYPOALLERGENIC - Luxuriously soft and gentle, our reusable and hypoallergenic facial pads effortlessly remove makeup and cleanse your skin with just water or can be used with your favorite cleanser

GENTLE FIBRES - The special fibre mix of the finest microfibre and viscose enables a particularly effective and skin-friendly removal of make-up, product residue and dirt without irritating or drying your skin

HOW TO USE - Wet with lukewarm water and move it over your face in circular movements until all dirt and makeup is removed. Wash it out with a little soap or put it in the washing machine. Washable up to 95¬∞C without fabric softener, then tumble dry

AWARD-WINNING LUXURY FIBRES - Consciously Crafted in Germany with ultra-soft luxury fibres, our products are clinically tested and dermatologically approved to the highest standard. Recognised for innovation and excellence‚Äîcertified to deliver beauty with integrity

WHY CHOOSE WASHCIES - Founded in 2018 and the Proud winner of Germany's 'Dragons Den', waschies is an independent, female-founded brand on a mission to redefine skincare with sustainability at its core. Our products are machine washable and designed to be reused again and again, offering a kinder choice for your skin and the planet
description: Product Description Discover the award-winning waschies make-up and cleaning pads - known from "The Den of the Lions". These reusable pads made from innovative high-tech fibre mix gently and thoroughly clean your skin with just water - ideal for daily facial cleansing and make-up removal. They are the perfect sustainable alternative to conventional cotton pads and disposable wipes, skin-friendly, hypoallergenic and machine washable. Suitable for all skin types, including sensitive skin, rosacea or eczema. Awarded the Oeko-Tex Standard 100 and the German Innovation Award. Waschies: For pure skin, less waste and a better skin feeling Directions How to use: Wet with lukewarm water and run in a circular motion over face, eyes and mouth until dirt and makeup are completely removed. Then wash with a little soap or put in the washing machine. Care instructions: washable up to 95 ¬∞C without fabric softener. Tumble dryer-safe Safety Warning Avoid contact with eyes. If irritation occurs, discontinue use. Wash pads with soap or machine wash without fabric softener. See more
